name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard terms for a mutual non-disclosure agreement (MNDA) that lets two parties share confidential information for a stated purpose, such as evaluating a potential business relationship, while protecting that information from unauthorized use or disclosure.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement Cover Page
description: The fillable cover page used together with the Mutual NDA Standard Terms to identify the parties and complete the purpose, effective date, term, and governing law needed to execute a Common Paper Mutual NDA.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement governing a customer's subscription to and use of a provider's cloud/SaaS product, including support, fees, data privacy, warranties, liability, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for giving an early customer access to a product in exchange for feedback that helps the provider develop and improve it ahead of general availability.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement defining uptime and support response time commitments for a cloud service, along with the service credits and termination rights available if those commitments are not met.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement governing statements of work under which a provider delivers services and deliverables to a customer, covering IP assignment, fees, warranties, and liability.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement governing how a provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer, including subprocessors, international data transfers, security incident response, and audit rights, in line with GDPR and UK GDPR.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement granting a customer a license to install and use a provider's software, covering updates, open source components, restrictions, warranties, and liability.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for business partnerships involving mutual obligations, optional fees, and a trademark license for the parties to reference each other's brand elements.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for a time-limited evaluation of a provider's product by a customer prior to entering into a longer-term definitive agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) governing a business associate's use and protection of Protected Health Information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity under HIPAA.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper Standard AI Addendum that supplements an existing agreement to govern the use of a provider's AI/ML services, including input and output ownership, model training, and AI-specific disclaimers.
